raw_input.title: Desarrollador Python + AWS / Madrid (FREELANCE)
raw_input.job_html_or_text: Python developer with AWS, backend services, scalable REST APIs, cloud solutions, CI/CD. Freelance full-time long-term contract. Hybrid in Madrid, Aravaca area.

profile.base_cv_text: Backend Python/Django/FastAPI/PostgreSQL engineer in Malaga, open to remote/hybrid Spain/EU. Prefers employment; Madrid hybrid commute and freelance lower priority.

human_review_notes: Reviewed real case: stack fit is good, but freelance and hybrid Madrid mean it should not be automatic APPLY_NOW.
